name: scriptura
description: Scriptura — a Telegram bot that runs adaptive Bible reading plans (66 books / 1189 chapters, four reading modes, streaks, catch-up math). Cloudflare Worker + D1.

scripts.//: No local dev scripts — this project is deployed via Cloudflare's dashboard Git integration. See README.md.
scripts.deploy-hint: echo 'Deploy through the Cloudflare dashboard (Workers → Create → Connect Git). See README.md.'
